ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2023 Continued To Aug-29-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Order
Pursuant To Crc 3.770; Memorandum Of Points And
Authorities; Declaration Of Shannon Guevara In Support
Thereof
Off Calendar May-19-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LAUREN GOLDBOSS' Motion For Dismissal Order Pursuant To CRC 3.770.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is denied without prejudice.

CRC 3.770 (a) requires a declaration on all consideration, received by counsel or the client, in return for the dismissal. Strict compliance with this rule is required. See, e.g., Weil & Brown, et al., California Practice Guide: Civil Procedure Before Trial 14:138- 14:138.9 (Rutter: 2022). If there is any such compensation, direct or indirect, it must be stated in the declaration in "detail," and it must be shown why plaintiff, or counsel, absent class certification, would be entitled to it. For example, if there are attorney fees paid, the declaration must demonstrate that the plaintiff, absent class certification, would be entitled to fees.

Order signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)
